scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd plassy-app typecheck && bun run --cwd plassy-backend typecheck && bun run --cwd plassy-contracts typecheck && bun run --cwd plassy-frontend typecheck && bun run --cwd plassy-scraper typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd plassy-app test && bun run --cwd plassy-backend test && bun run --cwd plassy-contracts test && bun run --cwd plassy-frontend test && bun run --cwd plassy-scraper test
scripts.test:coverage: bun run --cwd plassy-app test:coverage && bun run --cwd plassy-backend test:coverage && bun run --cwd plassy-contracts test:coverage && bun run --cwd plassy-frontend test:coverage && bun run --cwd plassy-scraper test:coverage
